sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ يَاسِرٌ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ طَبْخَ الْكُسْكُسِ.
sentences.translation: Jasir je htio naučiti kuhati kuskus.
sentences.translationEn: Yasir wanted to learn to cook couscous.

sentences.translation: Zamolio je majku da ga nauči.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his mother to teach him.
The mother explained the steps patiently.

sentences.translation: Jasir je skuhao kuskus i bio je dobar.
sentences.translationEn: Yasir cooked the couscous and it was good.
